display_name: Employment Offer Letter / Termination Letter (Indian Private Sector)
structural_summary: A formal letter on company letterhead with two sub-kinds: offer of employment and termination of employment, Indian private-sector style. Layout: letterhead reference line; date line; reference number; addressee block (employee name, address); subject line; salutation; body — offers state designation, annual CTC (break-up in an annexure), joining date, probation and confirmation, notice period, work location, statutory benefits (PF, gratuity) and conditions precedent, ending with an acceptance endorsement; terminations recite the employment, the reason, notice served or pay in lieu, last working day, full and final settlement and return of company property; closing 'Yours sincerely', 'For [COMPANY NAME]', signature, name and designation of the authorised signatory.
statutory_requirements:
- Open on company letterhead with a date line, addressee employee block and a subject line stating the nature of the letter.
- Both kinds: name the employee and designation, use clear effective-date language, mention the applicable notice period, and close with 'Yours sincerely', 'For [COMPANY NAME]' and the authorised signatory's name and designation.
- Offers: state annual CTC (break-up in an annexure), joining date, probation period and confirmation, notice period and work location; reference provident fund under the Employees' Provident Funds and Miscellaneous Provisions Act, 1952 and gratuity under the Payment of Gratuity Act, 1972, qualified 'as applicable' since coverage and thresholds vary.
- Offers: include conditions precedent (document and background verification) and an employee acceptance endorsement.
- Terminations: recite the employment, state the reason, the last working day, whether notice is served or salary is paid in lieu, full and final settlement, and return of company property.
- Where state law governs notice or termination conditions, flag [VERIFY: applicable state Shops and Establishments Act] instead of citing a specific state statute.
- Misconduct terminations: recite the domestic inquiry and insert [VERIFY: domestic inquiry held and principles of natural justice followed]; do not assert compliance.
- Redundancy or restructuring terminations: insert [VERIFY: workman status and Section 25F, Industrial Disputes Act, 1947 retrenchment compliance] rather than asserting it.
- Never describe the employment as 'at-will'.

fields.name: company_name
fields.description: Employer issuing the letter; appears in the letterhead reference and the 'For [COMPANY NAME]' sign-off.

fields.name: employee_name
fields.description: Addressee of the letter (candidate for offers, employee for terminations).

fields.name: designation
fields.description: Position offered, or the position held at termination; mentioned in both sub-kinds.

fields.name: employee_address
fields.description: Residential address for the addressee block; for offers assumed to be in the work location city.

fields.name: annual_ctc
fields.description: Annual Cost to Company; break-up referred to an annexure.

fields.name: joining_date
fields.description: Future joining date stated in the offer.

fields.name: probation_months
fields.description: Probation period from the date of joining, with confirmation on satisfactory completion.

fields.name: notice_period_days
fields.description: Contractual notice period for either party, in days.

fields.name: work_location
fields.description: City of the office or plant where the employee will be based.

fields.name: termination_reason
choices: non-confirmation of services during the probation period
misconduct established in a domestic inquiry
fields.description: Stated ground for termination; drives which [VERIFY] flag the document must carry.

fields.name: last_working_day
fields.description: Future last working day; first and only date field generated for termination letters.

fields.name: notice_disposition
fields.placeholder: [NOTICE SERVED OR PAY IN LIEU OF NOTICE]
choices: the notice period will be served until the last working day
payment in lieu of the notice period will be made with the full and final settlement
fields.description: Whether the contractual notice is served or salary is paid in lieu.

fields.name: signatory_name
fields.description: Name printed under the signature in the 'For [COMPANY NAME]' block.

fields.name: employee_id
fields.description: Employee code quoted in the addressee block of termination letters.
